item.title: F-001: Open File
item.intent: Users must be able to open any markdown file from any location via the system file picker — no vault, no import, no friction
item.description: Open any markdown file via UIDocumentPickerViewController. Filters to markdown extensions (.md, .markdown, .mdown, .mkd, .mkdn, .mdx) per D-FILE-6. UTF-8 only (D-FILE-2). Error on non-UTF-8. Warning on >1MB. Editable immediately. File open to editing ready <500ms for <100KB files. Depends on: FEAT-040 (File Coordination Layer).
acceptanceCriteria: User opens a .md file from iCloud Drive, edits it, and the edit is saved back to the same file in place
Non-UTF-8 file shows error without crashing or corrupting
VoiceOver announces file opened with filename
Security-scoped bookmark persists — file reopens on next launch without re-picking
Opening a file already open in another editor window shows that window instead of duplicating
File provider going offline mid-session preserves in-memory content and shows non-modal error
